name: across the real spec corpus the majority of specs receive a scoped dependency hash rather than the whole-tree fallback
command: node "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/dep-hash.js" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/specs" rod 2>/dev/null; total=$(ls rod | wc -l); scoped=$(grep -Lx GLOBAL rod/* 2>/dev/null | wc -l); [ "$scoped" -gt $((total/2)) ] && echo majority-specs-scoped 1>&2
